title: Potential of Groundwater Heat Pump Use, Bavaria, Germany
author: Zosseder, Kai
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The dataset provides energy potential data on shallow open-loop groundwater systems for Bavaria, Germany. For further explanation see:   Bayerisches Landesamt für Umwelt (LfU) (2024): Bayernweite, räumlich detaillierte Bestimmung des umsetzbaren Potenzials der oberflächennahen Geothermie zur Einbindung in den Energie-Atlas Bayern. (Bavaria-wide, spatially detailed determination of the realisable potential of near-surface geothermal energy for integration into the Energy Atlas of Bavaria): https://www.cee.ed.tum.de/fileadmin/w00cbe/hydro/Pictures/pic_projects/EnergieAtlas/EAB_Abschlussbericht_final_20240408.pdf Böttcher, F., Casasso, A., Götzl, G., Zosseder, K. (2019): TAP - Thermal aquifer Potential: A quantitative method to assess the spatial potential for the thermal use of groundwater. Renewable Energy, 142, 85-95. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.renene.2019.04.086.
steps_raw: The dataset provides energy potential data on shallow open-loop groundwater systems for Bavaria, Germany. For further explanation see:   Bayerisches Landesamt für Umwelt (LfU) (2024): Bayernweite, räumlich detaillierte Bestimmung des umsetzbaren Potenzials der oberflächennahen Geothermie zur Einbindung in den Energie-Atlas Bayern. (2019): TAP - Thermal aquifer Potential: A quantitative method to assess the spatial potential for the thermal use of groundwater. Renewable Energy, 142, 85-95. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.renene.2019.04.086.
